signals.headline: Bitcoin surpassed $71,000 recently, driving broader crypto recovery including XRP above $1
signals.raw:
Bitcoin surpassed $71,000 recently, driving broader crypto recovery including XRP above $1.35, with whale accumulation at 10-month highs and exchange outflows accelerating.[1]  

No confirmed breaking announcements today (April 23, 2026, 9 AM UTC) on "will october" predictions or April resolutions beyond ongoing CLARITY Act progress; past October 2025 crash references are historical.[1][3]
